title: Frontend Developer
short_description: Build and maintain modern web UI with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and a strong focus on UX.
main_description:
About the role

As a Frontend Developer at TechNova, you will work on a modern job marketplace platform and ship pixel-perfect, responsive experiences consistent with our design system.

What you will do

  • Implement reusable UI components using React and TypeScript
  • Collaborate closely with designers to match Figma layouts and typography
  • Optimize pages for performance and accessibility

Requirements

  • 2+ years experience with modern React
  • Good understanding of responsive design and CSS
  • Experience with a state manager such as Redux Toolkit is a plus

title: Backend Developer
short_description: Design and develop secure, scalable RESTful APIs using Node.js and modern cloud tooling.
main_description:
About CloudWare

CloudWare builds highly available backend services for SaaS products. As a Backend Developer you will design, build, and maintain APIs used by millions of users.

Tech stack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes.

Key responsibilities

  • Design RESTful endpoints and integrate with third-party services
  • Write unit/integration tests and improve API performance
  • Collaborate with frontend engineers to define clean contracts

title: Full Stack Engineer
short_description: Deliver features across frontend and backend, taking full ownership from idea to deployment.
main_description:
About the role

As a Full Stack Engineer, you will touch everything from UI to database. You will work in a small, agile squad and ship features end-to-end.

Responsibilities

  • Design clean APIs and build UI flows that feel great to use
  • Work with React, Node.js, and SQL/NoSQL databases
  • Review code and mentor junior engineers

title: UI/UX Designer
short_description: Create wireframes, high-fidelity mockups, and polished UI that feels delightful and consistent.
main_description:
About Creative Hub

We are looking for a UI/UX Designer who is passionate about crafting beautiful and usable interfaces.

You will

  • Translate product ideas into wireframes and interactive prototypes
  • Maintain our design system and component library
  • Work closely with engineers to ensure a smooth handoff

title: Product Manager
short_description: Own product vision, gather requirements, and prioritize the roadmap alongside design and engineering.
main_description:
About the role

As a Product Manager at GrowthLoop, you will sit at the intersection of business, design, and engineering.

Responsibilities

  • Define and communicate clear product goals
  • Work with stakeholders to refine requirements
  • Create simple, outcome-driven roadmaps

title: Data Analyst
short_description: Analyze product and business data, build dashboards, and provide clear, actionable insights.
main_description:
What you will do

  • Work with large datasets using SQL and Python/R
  • Build dashboards in tools like Looker or Power BI
  • Help product and marketing teams make data-driven decisions

title: DevOps Engineer
short_description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and observability stack to keep deployments smooth.
main_description:
Responsibilities

  • Maintain CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.)
  • Automate infrastructure with Terraform or similar tools
  • Monitor and improve system reliability and performance

title: Mobile App Developer
short_description: Develop and ship high-quality Android and iOS apps using React Native or Flutter.
main_description:
About the role

As a Mobile App Developer you will build new mobile experiences and improve existing ones, focusing on performance and smooth UX.

title: QA Engineer
short_description: Write test cases, automate regression suites, and ensure product quality before every release.
main_description:
Key responsibilities

  • Design and maintain test plans for new features
  • Automate repetitive test flows using modern tools
  • Collaborate with developers to track and fix bugs

title: Machine Learning Engineer
short_description: Build, evaluate, and deploy ML models to solve real business problems with data.
main_description:
About AI Dynamics

We focus on applied machine learning. As an ML Engineer you will own models from experimentation to production.

title: Technical Support Engineer
short_description: Troubleshoot customer issues, provide clear explanations, and document common solutions.
main_description:
About the role

You will be the first point of contact for our users, helping them solve technical problems and be successful with our product.

title: Systems Administrator
short_description: Maintain servers, networks, and security systems to keep everything fast and secure.
main_description:
Responsibilities

  • Maintain on-prem and cloud infrastructure
  • Implement security best practices
  • Monitor uptime and respond to incidents

title: Content Writer
short_description: Write blog posts, landing pages, and campaign copy that is engaging and SEO-friendly.
main_description:
About the role

As a Content Writer, you will craft stories that connect with our audience and support product launches and campaigns.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
short_description: Plan and execute digital campaigns, manage paid and organic channels, and report on performance.
main_description:
Responsibilities

  • Run campaigns across search, social, and display
  • Measure and optimize performance using analytics tools
  • Collaborate with design and content on creative

title: HR Generalist
short_description: Support hiring, onboarding, and employee engagement while maintaining HR processes and policies.
main_description:
About PeopleFirst

We believe in people-first culture. You will help build and support that culture every day.

title: Business Analyst
short_description: Gather requirements, document processes, and recommend improvements to business workflows.
main_description:
Key responsibilities

  • Run stakeholder workshops and discovery sessions
  • Map current and future-state processes
  • Create clear documentation for technical teams

title: Graphic Designer
short_description: Design marketing assets, social media graphics, and maintain a consistent visual brand.
main_description:
About the role

You will create visuals that represent our brand across web, social, and print.

title: Sales Executive
short_description: Prospect new clients, maintain relationships, and consistently hit or exceed sales targets.
main_description:
Responsibilities

  • Identify and qualify new leads
  • Run demos and presentations
  • Negotiate and close deals

title: Customer Success Manager
short_description: Ensure customers get value from the product, manage renewals, and reduce churn over time.
main_description:
About the role

You will be a trusted advisor to our customers, helping them succeed with our platform.

title: Project Manager
short_description: Plan and track project timelines, manage resources, and keep stakeholders aligned and informed.
main_description:
Responsibilities

  • Create and maintain realistic project plans
  • Coordinate cross-functional teams
  • Communicate clearly with stakeholders
